positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of a majestic, stylized celestial wolf howling at a crescent moon. The wolf and surrounding flora are depicted in thick, clean silhouettes, integrated with geometric celestial patterns, deep botanical engravings, and bioluminescent nebula details. The style is neo-art nouveau gothic illustration, emphasizing strong contrast, crisp lines, and symmetrical composition. Color palette should utilize deep jewel tones: midnight blue, emerald green, and rich gold accents. The artwork must be suitable for a striking, clean apparel print, ultra-detailed, ink illustration, vector quality.
